title: WOMEN'S CENTER - 211info
text: GOOD SHEPHERD WOMEN'S CENTER WOMEN'S CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services and support for menstrual cycle, incontinence, fertility and infertility, prolapse, infections, and other women's health conditions. Also provides therapies, treatment and sugical services including hysterectomy and tubal ligation. 620 NW 11th Street Suite 106 Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Women of all ages Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm (541) 667-3801 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 667-3801 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Birth Control Counseling Contraception Emergency Contraception Infertility Services Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Sterilization * Women Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOOD SHEPHERD WOMEN'S CENTER
